notes: HARD set for iteration-2, run on a weaker model (Haiku). Queries use bare acronyms, misspellings, and cross-release red herrings so the matching-guide (acronym expansion + release routing) is actually load-bearing. Ground truth verified against RAN2#134 agenda tree.

evals.name: ncr-corrections-acronym
evals.prompt: which RAN2#134 agenda item is for NCR essential corrections?
evals.why_hard: NCR must be expanded to 'network-controlled repeaters'; it's a Rel-18 maintenance item

evals.name: ambient-iot-org-misspelled
evals.prompt: where's the ambiant IoT organisational item in the agenda?
evals.why_hard: misspelling of 'Ambient'; must pick the .1 Organizational sub-item

evals.name: xr-rel18-release-trap
evals.prompt: where do the rel-18 XR papers go in RAN2#134?
evals.why_hard: XR appears as Rel-18 (6.0.2.16), Rel-19 Ph3 (7.7), Rel-20 Ph4 (8.5)

evals.name: lpwus-org-acronym
evals.why_hard: acronym LP-WUS = Low-Power Wake-Up Signal; 'org' = Organizational .1

evals.name: navic-obscure
evals.prompt: which agenda item covers the NavIC papers?

evals.name: mobile-iab-rel18
evals.why_hard: IAB = Integrated Access and Backhaul; Rel-18 maintenance item
